title: verbascum olympicum
intro: Verbascum olympicum, also known as the Olympic mullein or Greek mullein, is a biennial plant species belonging to the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats. The health benefits of Verbascum olympicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Verbascum olympicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
